name: Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the buttermilk and baking soda into a liquid measuring cup, set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, measure the flours, sugar, and baking powder. Blend together.
3. Add the egg, oil, and vanilla extract to the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Pour in the buttermilk mixture and stir again to blend.
5. Prepare topping: Mix 1/2 cup lightly packed brown sugar, 1 tablespoon cinnamon, and 1 tablespoon butter.
6. Spread half of the batter into a greased 9x9 pan and sprinkle with about one-third of the topping.
7. Cover with the remaining batter, then sprinkle the rest of the topping on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
